calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Verleana Green for Bethlehem Tsegaye (Petitioner).

Ms. Green stated that she filed the Proof of Service this morning and that all Parties have received notice. The Court ordered that this case PES-12-295328 be consildated with lead case PES-11-294813. All documents are to be filed in the lead case 294813. No further documents are to filed in case number 295328. Ms. Green is to prepare the order consolidating the actions. The Spousal Property Petition is to be heard in case number 294813 and is continued to April 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
